meaning: n.表面,外表,水面adj.表面的,肤浅的
examples: He staggered on the uneven surface.
70% of our globe's surface is water.
Gleaming ripples cut the lake's surface.
On the surface side, Joy has nearly twice the sales of its nearest competitor, Bucyrus International.
On the surface, Viread seemed to work like AZT and Zerit, but underneath it worked better.
